     the Fermi energy is    -0.1501 ev

!    total energy              =  -11738.23645866 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000002 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08739306 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11738.14906560 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -239475.36819703 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120850.17699109 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4203.09923287 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  111093.15835553 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01698231 Ry

     total magnetization       =    42.02 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    52.76 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  35 iterations
